name: hn-stories-table
description: get-front-page and get-latest-posts return arrays of stories. Each story has {id, title, url, score, by (author), time (unix), descendants (comment count), type}. Display as a sortable table.
data_shape: array of {id: number, title: string, url: string, score: number, by: string, time: number, descendants: number, type: string}

name: hn-stats-dashboard
description: get-front-page returns scored stories. Aggregate scores, comment counts, and post times for charts. Score distribution, top domains, posting frequency over hours.
data_shape: array of {id: number, title: string, score: number, descendants: number, time: number, url: string} — aggregate for charts
